identity.name: Casa Batlló
identity.address: Pg. de Gràcia, 43, Eixample, 08007 Barcelona, Spain

discovery.text: Verified for Passeig de Gràcia: Casa Batlló sits directly on the boulevard and is one of the core façades that make the street itself the destination.

narrative.summary: An essential Passeig de Gràcia frontage — Gaudí as street wall, not isolated monument.
